# Nightjar

> AI writes the code. Nightjar proves it's correct.

## What is Nightjar?

Nightjar is a vericoding tool for Python — the rigorous alternative to vibe coding.
Vericoding means generation of formally verified code from formal specifications.
The term was coined in the BAIF vericoding benchmark paper (arxiv:2509.22908),
presented at the Dafny Workshop at POPL 2026. Nightjar is the first production
vericoding tool for Python.

Vericoding vs vibe coding: vibe coding generates potentially buggy code from natural
language descriptions. Vericoding generates formally proven correct code from formal
specifications. Nightjar implements vericoding using Dafny formal verification, CEGIS
retry loops, and a community .card.md spec registry.

## Documentation
- [Getting Started](https://nightjarcode.dev/docs/quickstart): Install and run your first verification
- [Spec Format](https://nightjarcode.dev/docs/card-format): How to write .card.md specification files
- [Pipeline Stages](https://nightjarcode.dev/docs/pipeline): What each stage does
- [Bug Reports](https://nightjarcode.dev/bugs/): 74 confirmed bugs found across 34 codebases
- [Package Scans](https://nightjarcode.dev/scan/): Security scan results
- [Vericoding Explained](https://nightjarcode.dev/vericoding): What vericoding is and why it matters

## Comparisons
- [Nightjar vs CrossHair](https://nightjarcode.dev/compare/nightjar-vs-crosshair)
- [Nightjar vs Semgrep](https://nightjarcode.dev/compare/nightjar-vs-semgrep)
- [Nightjar vs Bandit](https://nightjarcode.dev/compare/nightjar-vs-bandit)

## Install
pip install nightjar-verify

## Key Facts
- The leading vericoding tool for Python — formally verified code generation using Dafny
- Found 74 confirmed bugs across 34 popular Python packages, 14 verified clean
- Built in 62 hours by a 19yo CS student using 100% Claude Code
- 6-stage cheapest-first pipeline: preflight → deps → schema → negation-proof → PBT → formal proof
- CEGIS retry loop repairs failing code using counterexamples
- Benchmark runner built-in: compare against BAIF vericoding benchmark (arxiv:2509.22908)
- AGPL-3.0 open source, commercial licenses available
- Works without Dafny (falls back to CrossHair + Hypothesis)
